promotionDelta: Remain explicitly Beta and excluded from Stable counts until physical iOS VoiceOver and Android TalkBack task evidence passes.

Pass pointer cancellation, WIP rejection, server rollback/retry, large-board virtualization, deterministic generation, and full cross-browser gates.
